classes.reasoning: This document is explicitly titled 'FOGLIO INFORMATIVO E MODULO DI CONSENSO INFORMATO PER LA PARTECIPAZIONE DEI PAZIENTI AI SOTTOSTUDI FACOLTATIVI' (Information Sheet and Informed Consent Form for Participation of Patients in Optional Sub-studies). It contains detailed patient consent sections, signature blocks for patient, witness, and physician, and explains patient rights, risks, and procedures for optional tumor biopsy sub-studies.

trial_title: Studio di fase 2, multicentrico, in aperto su lifileucel (linfociti infiltranti il tumore [TIL]) in partecipanti con melanoma avanzato precedentemente trattato
summary: This is an Italian-language informed consent form (ICF) for two optional sub-studies involving post-treatment and post-progression tumor biopsies within the IOV-MEL-202 phase 2 trial of lifileucel (tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes) in patients with previously treated advanced melanoma. The document explains the purpose, procedures, risks, benefits, and data handling for these optional biopsies, and includes consent signature sections for the patient, optional witness, and physician.
references_to: Decreto ministeriale del 15 luglio 1997 - Recepimento delle linee guida dell'Unione europea di buona pratica clinica per la esecuzione delle sperimentazioni cliniche dei medicinali
Precision for Medicine GmbH, Barbara-McClintock-Str. 6, 12489 Berlino, Germania
Comitato Etico Nazionale (CEN) per le sperimentazioni cliniche relative alle terapie avanzate ('ATMP') c/o AIFA, via del Tritone 181, 00187 Roma
